assertions.assertion: Shows AddUserAccessTokenHttpClient for the named HttpClient pattern with automatic token attachment
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM is unlikely to know the exact method name AddUserAccessTokenHttpClient

assertions.assertion: Shows GetUserAccessTokenAsync for the manual pattern
assertions.rationale: GetUserAccessTokenAsync is somewhat known from Duende documentation

assertions.assertion: Both API endpoints use .AsBffApiEndpoint() for CSRF protection
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might not consistently add AsBffApiEndpoint() to both patterns

assertions.assertion: Does NOT return the raw access token to the browser (no Results.Json with the token value)
assertions.rationale: General BFF security knowledge would avoid exposing tokens to the browser

assertions.assertion: Mentions that token refresh is handled automatically by AccessTokenManagement
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might not know the specific integration with AccessTokenManagement
